_metadata.description: FansToys items seed data — ready for database import

fk_references.character_slug: Lookup against characters.slug to get character_id at import time
fk_references.character_faction_id: Pre-resolved from character data for convenience (factions.id)
fk_references.character_sub_group_id: Pre-resolved from character data for convenience (sub_groups.id)

import_instructions: 1. Ensure factions, sub_groups, manufacturers, toy_lines are already seeded
2. Ensure characters are seeded (from g1-season*.json + jp-*.json + g1-toy-only-characters.json)
3. For each item: look up character_id via character_slug
4. Insert into items table with manufacturer_id, toy_line_id, character_id, product_code, name, slug, etc.
5. character_faction_id and character_sub_group_id are convenience fields — the canonical source is the characters table

items.name: MP-1 Trailer
items.notes: Accessory only; non-transforming trailer for Takara MP-1 Convoy

items.name: Acoustic Wave
items.notes: Never released under FT-02. Released as RP-01 under Robot Paradise sub-brand

items.name: Quake Wave
items.notes: FansToys' first full transforming figure. Multiple production runs

items.name: Quake Wave (Toy Deco)
items.notes: Darker purple with clear purple hands and chest

items.name: Quake Wave (Grey)
items.notes: Toy Dojo store exclusive grey color scheme

items.notes: Iron Dibots No.1. Transforms to Triceratops. Reissued 2017
